summary: Narrow same-tier fix for Round 010 workflow artifact issues: -NoRun now uses _validate directory instead of allocating real round dirs; tests.txt added to state.md Latest artifacts; trusted-input comment added for Invoke-Expression; accidental round_011 left intact with real artifacts written alongside.

files_changed.summary: -NoRun uses _validate dir; tests.txt in state.md Latest artifacts; trusted-input comment for Invoke-Expression

commands_run.notes: Used _validate directory, no new round_NNN created
Confirmed no round_012+ created by validation

acceptance.item: -NoRun no longer allocates real round dirs

acceptance.evidence: Only files inside _validate removed; real round dirs untouched

acceptance.item: tests.txt included in state.md Latest artifacts

acceptance.evidence: Left existing files intact; wrote real artifacts into same dir

acceptance.item: PowerShell validation does not create new round
Round 011 log and JSON report created
acceptance.evidence: kimi_log.md and kimi_report.json exist in round_011/

risks.description: Get-NextRoundDir will create round_012 next because round_011 already exists. This is correct behavior since round_011 now contains real artifacts, but may be unexpected if the user expected round_011 to be skipped.
risks.recommended_review: Consider whether round_011 should be treated as occupied now that it has real round artifacts.
